submissions.name: Rear Naked Choke
submissions.description: Classic back control strangle — chin tuck and squeeze

submissions.name: Guillotine Choke
submissions.description: Front headlock choke, works from guard or standing

submissions.name: Armbar
submissions.description: Hyperextension of the elbow from guard, mount, side control or back

submissions.name: Triangle Choke
submissions.description: Legs form a triangle around opponent's neck and one arm

submissions.name: Americana
submissions.description: Figure-four shoulder lock from top position

submissions.name: Kimura
submissions.description: Reverse figure-four shoulder lock from guard, half guard, side control

submissions.name: Straight Ankle Lock
submissions.description: Basic Achilles lock — entry-level leg lock

submissions.name: Cross Collar Choke
submissions.description: Deep two-hand lapel grip choke from closed guard or mount

submissions.name: Ezekiel Choke
submissions.description: Sleeve-assisted choke from mount or guard

submissions.name: Arm Triangle
submissions.description: Head-and-arm choke from top — uses opponent's own shoulder

submissions.name: Seated Guillotine
submissions.description: Guillotine finish from seated or guard position — tight hip squeeze

submissions.name: Scarf Hold Armbar
submissions.description: Armbar from scarf hold (kesa gatame) — short lever elbow lock

submissions.name: Omoplata
submissions.description: Shoulder lock using both legs — also a sweep entry

submissions.name: Bow and Arrow Choke
submissions.description: Gi collar choke from back control — one of the tightest gi finishes

submissions.name: Clock Choke
submissions.description: Collar choke while circling around a turtled opponent

submissions.name: D'Arce Choke
submissions.description: Arm-in brabo choke — no-gi headlock strangle

submissions.name: Anaconda Choke
submissions.description: Arm-in choke from front headlock or turtle — rolls into finish

submissions.name: Baseball Bat Choke
submissions.description: Two-handed collar grip choke from side control or turtle

submissions.name: Loop Choke
submissions.description: Single collar choke that catches an overcommitted passer

submissions.name: Bread Cutter Choke
submissions.description: Cross-face collar choke from half guard top

submissions.name: North-South Choke
submissions.description: Arm-trap choke from north-south using shoulder and bicep pressure

submissions.name: Wristlock
submissions.description: Hyperextension of the wrist — can be hidden in many positions

submissions.name: Paper Cutter Choke
submissions.description: Near-side lapel choke from half guard or side control

submissions.name: Peruvian Necktie
submissions.description: Neck crank/choke from front headlock — rolls into finish

submissions.name: High Elbow Guillotine
submissions.description: Arm-in guillotine with high elbow — tighter than standard guillotine

submissions.name: Calf Slicer
submissions.description: Knee compression through the calf from top half guard or leg entanglements

submissions.name: Von Flue Choke
submissions.description: Counter choke to a guillotine attempt from side control

submissions.name: Arm-In Guillotine
submissions.description: Guillotine with opponent's arm trapped inside — cuts off shoulder

submissions.name: Japanese Necktie
submissions.description: No-gi neck compression from front headlock

submissions.name: Mounted Kimura
submissions.description: Kimura grip secured from full mount — finish or take the back

submissions.name: 10-Finger Guillotine
submissions.description: Interlaced finger guillotine — high elbow variation for tighter squeeze

submissions.name: Marcelotine
submissions.description: Guillotine from half guard bottom — pull guard and finish simultaneously

submissions.name: Cross Armbar from Side Control
submissions.description: Far-side armbar from side control — thread leg across face to finish

submissions.name: Estima Lock
submissions.description: Quick toehold-like foot lock from top guard — catches opponents off guard

submissions.name: Gogoplata
submissions.description: Shin-on-throat choke from rubber guard — requires flexibility

submissions.name: Kneebar
submissions.description: Hyperextension of the knee — armbar mechanics applied to the knee

submissions.name: Toe Hold
submissions.description: Figure-four grip twisting the foot — torsional ankle/foot lock

submissions.name: Outside Heel Hook
submissions.description: Heel hook rotating outward — dangerous for knee ligaments

submissions.name: Bicep Slicer
submissions.description: Arm compression through the bicep from closed guard or top positions

submissions.name: Mounted Triangle
submissions.description: Triangle choke from full mount — controls and finishes in one

submissions.name: Reverse Triangle
submissions.description: Triangle choke in reverse — legs wrap neck from opposite direction

submissions.name: Side Triangle
submissions.description: Triangle from side control or north-south — legs lock from the side

submissions.name: Inverted Triangle
submissions.description: Triangle entered through inversion — wraps from inverted position under opponent

submissions.name: Twister
submissions.description: Spinal rotation submission from back control — 10th Planet signature

submissions.name: Banana Split
submissions.description: Hip adductor stretch from 50/50 or leg entanglements

submissions.name: Electric Chair Stretch
submissions.description: Hip/groin lock from deep half guard — Eddie Bravo system

submissions.name: Buggy Choke
submissions.description: Self-triangle choke from bottom side control — very sneaky

submissions.name: Suloev Stretch
submissions.description: Hip stretch and hamstring lock from leg entanglements

submissions.name: Triangle from Back Mount
submissions.description: Transitioning back control into triangle when opponent defends RNC

submissions.name: Baratoplata
submissions.description: Shoulder lock from guard using the leg — omoplata family technique

submissions.name: Pressing Armbar
submissions.description: Armbar from mount without swinging leg — press the elbow into the hip

submissions.name: Guillotine from Mount
submissions.description: Guillotine entered from full mount when opponent tucks head to escape

submissions.name: Ganzo Armbar
submissions.description: Armbar from failed omoplata or triangle — sneaky elbow trap

submissions.name: Mounted Omoplata
submissions.description: Omoplata shoulder lock transitioned from mount — spin into the lock

submissions.name: Inside Heel Hook
submissions.description: Heel hook rotating inward — most dangerous leg lock, requires expert control

submissions.name: Calf Crank
submissions.description: Torsional calf compression — twists the lower leg into the knee

submissions.name: Reverse Armbar
submissions.description: Elbow hyperextension in the opposite direction

submissions.name: Aoki Lock
submissions.description: Shoulder lock from turtle position — made famous by Shinya Aoki

submissions.name: Crucifix Neck Crank
submissions.description: Neck crank or choke from crucifix — both arms trapped, neck exposed

submissions.name: Gator Roll RNC
submissions.description: RNC using a rolling gator technique — catches escaping opponents

submissions.name: Shoulder Crush
submissions.description: Shoulder compression from top control — cranks the shoulder socket

submissions.name: Twisting Ankle Lock
submissions.description: Ankle lock with twisting component — hybrid heel hook and straight lock

submissions.name: Tarikoplata
submissions.description: Shoulder lock from back control using a figure-four leg grip — rare and effective

submissions.name: Monoplata
submissions.description: One-legged omoplata from side control — threads one leg to finish the shoulder

submissions.name: Spiral Armbar
submissions.description: Spinning armbar from guard or turtle — rotational entry to elbow lock

submissions.name: Leg Knot
submissions.description: Toehold applied with legs knotted around the limb — advanced leg lock control

submissions.name: Short Choke
submissions.description: Short arm RNC variation from back — elbow drives across the throat

submissions.name: Inverted Armbar
submissions.description: Armbar from inverted guard or berimbolo transition — attacks from unexpected angle

submissions.name: Calf Crush
submissions.description: Direct calf muscle compression from leg entanglements — no rotation needed

submissions.name: Flying Armbar
submissions.description: Jumping armbar from standing — spectacular and high-risk elite technique

submissions.name: Flying Triangle
submissions.description: Jumping triangle from standing or clinch — requires elite timing

submissions.name: Gogoplata from Back
submissions.description: Shin-on-throat choke transitioned from back control — elite flexibility needed

submissions.name: 50/50 Heel Hook Combination
submissions.description: Attacking heel hooks from 50/50 with inside/outside control transitions

submissions.name: Reverse Heel Hook
submissions.description: Heel hook applied with the opposite arm — extremely rare and dangerous

submissions.name: Gogoplata from Rubber Guard
submissions.description: Shin choke from full rubber guard mission control — 10th Planet elite finish

submissions.name: Sliding Collar Choke (Back)
submissions.description: Classic collar feed from back control — punch collar deep and finish with head position

submissions.name: Rear Triangle
submissions.description: Triangle from back control — trap one arm and lock legs around neck/shoulder

submissions.name: Mount Armbar (S-Mount Finish)
submissions.description: Classic mount-to-armbar using S-mount angle — pinch knees and control thumb line

submissions.name: Back Armbar (Chair-Sit Armbar)
submissions.description: Armbar from back control when opponent defends the neck — chair sit to isolate the arm

submissions.name: Brabo Choke (Gi D'Arce)
submissions.description: Gi lapel-assisted D'arce-style choke — feeds lapel and closes the head-and-arm

submissions.name: Belly-Down Straight Ankle Lock
submissions.description: Straight ankle lock with belly-down finish — heavy hips and tight elbow-to-ribs clamp

submissions.name: Power Guillotine (High Wrist)
submissions.description: No-gi guillotine with high wrist and shoulder crunch — compresses quickly from standing or guard

submissions.name: Arm Triangle (Mount Finish)
submissions.description: Mount-based arm triangle — walk to the side, drop shoulder pressure and seal the carotids

submissions.name: Triangle-Armbar Combo
submissions.description: Attack armbar when opponent postures inside your triangle — angle, isolate, and swing to finish

submissions.name: Omoplata-Triangle Chain Finish
submissions.description: Flow from triangle defense into omoplata — cut angle, sit up, and control posture to finish

position_pairs.name: Knee on Belly — Shrimp Escape vs Switches
position_pairs.blue_role: Knee on Belly — Pressure, Switching Sides, Hunting Far Arm/Choke
position_pairs.red_role: Defending Knee on Belly — Frame on Knee, Shrimp, Re-Guard or Underhook to Stand

position_pairs.name: Front Headlock — Stand-Up Escape vs Go-Behind
position_pairs.blue_role: Front Headlock — Chinstrap/Arm Control, Go-Behind Threat, Guillotine/D'Arce Threat
position_pairs.red_role: Defending Front Headlock — Clear Hands, Posture Up, Stand, Square and Re-Attack

position_pairs.name: Leg Entanglement Escape — SLX/Ashi
position_pairs.blue_role: Single Leg X / Ashi — Knee Line Controlled, Off-Balancing, Hunting Sweep/Footlock
position_pairs.red_role: Defending SLX/Ashi — Free Knee Line, Hide Heel, Peel Feet and Extract

position_pairs.name: Turtle — Granby/Sit-Out Escape vs Back Take
position_pairs.blue_role: Attacking Turtle — Seatbelt/Hooks, Spiral Ride, Hunting Back Take
position_pairs.red_role: Defending Turtle — Granby/Sit-Out, Face Opponent, Recover Guard or Stand

position_pairs.name: Closed Guard — Standing Break vs Hip Bump/Guillotine
position_pairs.blue_role: Inside Closed Guard — Posture, Stand to Break, Start Pass
position_pairs.red_role: Closed Guard Bottom — Break Posture, Threaten Hip Bump/Guillotine, Re-Clamp
